'''Katarin Pressor''' was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] daughter of [[Dillian Pressor]] and his wife and the sister of [[Jorad Pressor|Jorad]] and [[Rosemari Pressor Tabory|Rosemari Pressor]]. She was one of the passengers on ''[[Outbound Flight]]''.<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

==Behind the scenes==
In the novel ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'', the name of Jorad's sister was given as [[Rosemari Pressor Tabory|Rosemari]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" /> Whether Rosemari is the same person as Katarin or is another sister born after the crash is unknown. However, ''Survivor's Quest'' implies that she was born after the crash.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
